title: Fix Drop GPS + OneWay/RoundTrip logic in Customer booking form

requirements.summary: Add Drop Location Mode toggle (Manual/GPS) to One Way trip form
acceptanceCriteria: When trip type is One Way, a 'Drop Location Mode' toggle (Manual / GPS) is visible beneath the Drop fields.
The toggle design and behavior matches the existing Pickup Location Mode toggle exactly.
Selecting Manual leaves Drop Area and Drop Pincode inputs editable.

file_operations.description: Add dropLocationMode state ('manual' | 'gps') alongside existing pickupLocationMode state. When tripType is One Way, render a Drop Location Mode toggle beneath the Drop fields that matches the existing Pickup Location Mode toggle's design and behavior. Ensure the toggle only appears for One Way trips and defaults to 'manual'.

requirements.summary: Implement Drop GPS capture and auto-fill using existing Pickup GPS helper
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking GPS in the Drop Location Mode toggle triggers browser geolocation capture.
Captured latitude and longitude are stored in drop location state.
The same helper function used by Pickup GPS fills Drop Area and Drop Pincode from the captured coordinates.
Drop Area and Drop Pincode inputs remain visible and editable after GPS fill.

file_operations.description: When dropLocationMode is set to 'gps', trigger browser navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition to capture latitude and longitude. Store these coordinates in the dropLocation state object. Reuse the same GPS-to-area/pincode helper function that is already used by the Pickup GPS feature to auto-fill dropLocation.area and dropLocation.pincode from the captured coordinates. Ensure Drop Area and Drop Pincode input fields remain visible and editable after the GPS auto-fill.

requirements.summary: Disable/hide Drop fields for Round Trip and sync drop to pickup location
acceptanceCriteria: When trip type is Round Trip, all Drop input fields are disabled or hidden.
Drop location state is automatically synchronized to equal pickup location state.
Helper text 'Round trip: Drop location is same as Pickup.' is displayed.
On form submit, dropoffLocation is set to pickupLocation value.
Trip creation succeeds with Round Trip selection.

file_operations.description: When journeyType is 'roundTrip', disable or hide all Drop input fields (Drop Area, Drop Pincode, Drop Location Mode toggle). Add a useEffect that automatically synchronizes dropLocation state to equal pickupLocation whenever journeyType is Round Trip or pickupLocation changes. Display helper text 'Round trip: Drop location is same as Pickup.' beneath the disabled/hidden Drop fields. On form submit for Round Trip, ensure dropoffLocation in the TripRequest payload is set to pickupLocation.

requirements.summary: Map dropoffLocation correctly for One Way and ensure no regressions
acceptanceCriteria: On One Way submission, dropoffLocation is populated from dropLocation state (not pickupLocation).
No new console.log statements are present in modified files.
Auth state, login/logout flow, and health check banner behavior are unaffected.

file_operations.description: On form submit when journeyType is One Way, map dropoffLocation in the TripRequest payload to the dropLocation state (using the captured/entered drop coordinates and area/pincode). Ensure no new console.log statements are added. Verify that no changes affect auth hooks, Internet Identity flow, role selection, or the backend health check banner behavior.

Review the CustomerDashboard to ensure it correctly passes trip creation state to RideRequestForm and handles optimistic updates without interfering with the new Drop GPS or Round Trip logic. Verify no auth or flicker regressions are introduced by the form changes.
